languages.text: "Да уж! Абеляр, тебе есть чему поучиться у этого сервочерепа".
"Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: "Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."

languages.text: 「ええ、確かに！アベル、このサーボ・スカルから学ぶべきことはいくつかあるわよ」
languages.original_text: "Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."

languages.text: "Ja, in der Tat! Abelard, Ihr könntet von diesem Servoschädel noch einiges lernen."
languages.original_text: "Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: "Ja, in der Tat! Abelard, Ihr könntet von diesem Servoschädel noch einiges lernen."

languages.text: «¡Ya lo creo! Abelard, usted podría tomar ejemplo de este servocráneo».
languages.original_text: "Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: «¡Ya lo creo! Abelard, usted podría tomar ejemplo de este servocráneo».

languages.text: "Gerçekten! Abelard, bu hizmeletten birkaç şey öğrenebilirsin."
languages.original_text: "Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekten! Abelard, bu hizmeletten birkaç şey öğrenebilirsin."

languages.text: « En effet ! Abélard, vous auriez bien des choses à apprendre de ce servocrâne. »
languages.original_text: "Yes, indeed! Abelard, you could learn a thing or two from this servo-skull."

traits.locale_text: « En effet ! Abélard, vous auriez bien des choses à apprendre de ce servocrâne. »

languages.text: “说得好！阿贝拉德，你真该向这台伺服头骨讨教一番。”
